title: Birch: Reloaded
description: Makes birch wood related items & blocks less vibrant and whiter in coloration.
body:
# Birch: Reloaded
*Transforms birch wood-related blocks and items with a more subtle, natural white coloration, reducing the excessive vibrancy of vanilla materials.*

## Features
  - Completely recolored birch planks, logs, and stripped variants
  - Refined design for all birch wood furniture (doors, trapdoors, fences, etc.)
  - Redesigned birch boat and sign items for visual consistency
  - Enhanced fletching table appearance with matching birch aesthetics

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
